title: Simple Database CRUD API
statement:
Create an API that allows CRUD operations on a simple in-memory book database.

## Endpoints

### GET /api/books

* Returns a list of all books in the database.
* Optional query parameters:
* `title` - search for books by title.
* `author` - search for books by author.

### GET /api/books/:id

* Returns a single book by ID.

### POST /api/books

* Creates a new book in the database.
* Request body:
* `title` (string) - the title of the book.
* `author` (string) - the author of the book.

### PUT /api/books/:id

* Updates a book in the database.
* Request body:
* `title` (string) - the new title of the book.
* `author` (string) - the new author of the book.

### DELETE /api/books/:id

* Deletes a book from the database.

## Constraints

* Must use the provided in-memory book database.
* Must handle invalid input (e.g. missing fields, invalid data types).

## Example Use Cases

* Get a list of all books: `GET /api/books`
* Get a single book by ID: `GET /api/books/1`
* Create a new book: `POST /api/books` with request body `{ title: 'New Book', author: 'New Author' }`
* Update a book: `PUT /api/books/1` with request body `{ title: 'Updated Book', author: 'Updated Author' }`
* Delete a book: `DELETE /api/books/1`
constraints: Must use only the provided in-memory book database.
Must handle invalid input (e.g. missing fields, invalid data types).
